summary:
I don't have permission to access `/Users/vatsalbhatt230813/Code/agent-studio` from this session. The Claude Code environment restricts me to working within `/private/tmp/fittrack-app`.

To analyze the agent-studio project, you have a few options:

1. **Change working directory**: If you have a Claude Code session open in that project directory, run the analysis there
2. **Copy the project**: Copy agent-studio into the fittrack-app working directory so I can analyze it
3. **Use the web app**: Open the agent-studio project directly in claude.ai/code, which will run in the correct directory context
